---
title: "Contact"
format:
  html:
    css: assets/styles.css
    code-copy: false
---

::: {.content-wrap}

We'd love to hear from you! Whether you have questions, suggestions, or want to collaborate, feel free to reach out.

### Contact Form

::: {.contact-form}
```{ojs}
//| echo: false

viewof contactForm = Inputs.form({
  Name: Inputs.text({ placeholder: "Your name" }),
  Email: Inputs.text({ placeholder: "your.email@example.com", type: "email" }),
  Subject: Inputs.select(
    ["General Inquiry", "Data Question", "Collaboration", "Technical Support", "Other"],
    { value: "General Inquiry" }
  ),
  Message: Inputs.textarea({ placeholder: "Your message here...", rows: 6 })
})
```
```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof submit = Inputs.button("Send Message", {value: 0})
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

submissionResult = {
  if (contactForm && contactForm.Name && contactForm.Email && contactForm.Message) {
    return html`
      <div style="margin-top: 1rem; padding: 1rem; background-color: #d4edda; border: 1px solid #c3e6cb; border-radius: 4px; color: #155724;">
        <strong>✓ Thank you for your message!</strong><br>
        We'll get back to you at <b>${contactForm.Email}</b> as soon as possible.
        <br><br>
        <em>Note: This is a demo form. In production, this would integrate with an email service or backend API.</em>
      </div>
    `;
  }
  return html``;
}
```

:::

:::
